description_long: This is a tall, rectangular lotion box with a predominantly white background and elegant black line art illustrations of grape clusters and vine leaves wrapping around its surfaces. The front face features the brand name 'LA ESPERA' and the label 'Edicion Limitada' in a blue accent, along with the word 'MALBEC' at the bottom. One side is adorned with large, detailed vine leaves, while the opposite side contains descriptive text about the product, including sections labeled 'Color', 'Aroma', and 'Sabor'. The final side has a short quote and more vine leaf illustrations. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard, designed to house a lotion bottle inside, and is visually striking with its artistic, wine-inspired theme.
description: A tall, white rectangular lotion box with black vine and grape illustrations, blue accent text, and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'LA ESPERA' brand, 'Edicion Limitada' label, grape illustration, and 'MALBEC' text.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by large, detailed vine leaves and minimal text.
description_view_2: Side view with product information sections labeled 'Color', 'Aroma', and 'Sabor', plus vine illustrations.
description_view_3: Rear view with a short quote and vine leaf illustrations, minimal text.
